input.initialPrompt: I want to run these tests with dotnet test and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host.

arguments.description: Run tests with blame-crash for crash dumps

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run tests with blame-crash for crash dumps

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to run the tests in this project with `dotnet test` and collect a crash dump if any test crashes the host. This involves using the `--blame-crash` option with `dotnet test`.

Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-e8be1bd13970444a954fc60bf0475ed6 && dotnet test --blame-crash", "description": "Run tests with blame-crash for crash dumps", "initial_wait": 60}

data.content:
Tests ran successfully with `--blame-crash` enabled. The command used:

```
dotnet test --blame-crash
```

All tests passed. If a test had crashed the host process, a crash dump (`.dmp` file) would be collected automatically in the `TestResults` directory for post-mortem analysis.
